Description: The program focuses on practical programming, interface design, and website creation. Students study front-end development, master the HTML markup language, cascading CSS style sheets, and the basics of JavaScript programming. The course includes adaptive layout, cross-browser design, and web page optimization.

The program includes mathematical modeling, probability calculation, and statistical data analysis. Students study random events, combinatorics, and theorems of addition and multiplication of probabilities. The course covers random variables: discrete distributions, continuous densities, mathematical expectation, and variance.
